meta.note: Sole authoritative structured tree for this repository and web app. Sync: .venv/bin/python scripts/sync_family_tree_json.py (vault master; GEDCOM gap-fill default).

coverage.lineageGraph: Full set of individuals and family unions from the 2020 RootsMagic/MyHeritage export: same person and family counts as that .ged (571 INDI, 206 FAM).
perPersonFields: displayName — from GEDCOM; overridden when people/*.md sets display_name
personPage — repo-relative people/*.md when treeId set
birthDateAlt — alternate birth from research (e.g. GEDCOM vs passport)
birthDateGedcom, deathDateGedcom — raw GEDCOM DATE when date was gap-filled from .ged
omittedFromGedcom: RESI, OCCU, EVEN, NOTE, SOUR (not merged)
Secondary names beyond the first NAME line
Full GEDCOM text and citation detail
coverage.intent: family-tree.json is the structured master: people/*.md (treeId) updates it; GEDCOM only fills missing vitals when present. Narrative and citations stay in Markdown and sources/.
